modules.title: Products
modules.description: Full SKU list with technical attributes, pricing and channel-specific publication status for all distribution channels.

modules.title: Product Sets
modules.description: Group products by collection, series or bundle. Manage relationships between related SKUs across the furniture range.

modules.title: Image Engine
modules.description: Upload, classify and optimise product imagery. Supports auto-crop and channel-specific resizing for all sales platforms.

modules.title: Document Hub
modules.description: Store technical datasheets, catalogue PDFs, certifications and assembly guides linked directly to each product SKU.

modules.title: Social Campaign
modules.description: Create and schedule content campaigns for Instagram, Pinterest and LinkedIn. Directly linked to PIM product data.

modules.title: Publish Flow
modules.description: Automated publish pipeline to retail channels: Website, Amazon EU, Wayfair and OTTO — with validation and asset checks.

modules.title: D365 Sync
modules.description: Bidirectional sync with Microsoft Dynamics 365. Monitor sync status, handle errors and configure field mapping rules.

modules.title: Settings
modules.description: Configure connected accounts, user permissions, content language settings and global PIM system preferences.
